html:
2026-0405
2026-04-30GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityCanada - Hellenic Republic on the Mutual Protection of Classified Information ** Agreement ** Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between Canada and the Government of the Hellenic Republic on the Mutual Protection of Classified Information.N/A
subject: Canada - Hellenic Republic on the Mutual Protection of Classified Information ** Agreement **
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between Canada and the Government of the Hellenic Republic on the Mutual Protection of Classified Information.
